title: Samsung Unveils UFS 5.0 Storage Chip, Doubling Speeds to Power On-Device AI
description: Samsung introduces UFS 5.0, the fastest storage solution for mobile AI, offering significant speed, efficiency, and size improvements. Mass production begins soon, with potential debut in Galaxy S27.

title: Statewide Camera Network and AI Advance Early Wildfire Detection Across California
description: Axis Communications supports a public safety initiative delivering real-time visual intelligence to emergency responders while enhancing environmental monitoring and disaster resilience CHELMSFORD, Mass. — Axis Communications today announced its ongoing collaboration with the University of California San Diego’s ALERTCalifornia – a statewide program helping advance wildfire detection and emergency response through AI, real-time intelligence, and [...]

title: Wall St falls at open on tech selloff as concerns about hawkish Fed, AI spending mount
description: Wall Street's main indexes opened lower on Tuesday, following sharp losses in megacap and semiconductor stocks as investors braced for a more hawkish Federal Reserve and scrutinized growing debt-funded AI spending.

title: NetApp Enhances Support for AI Workloads at Massive Scale
description: StorageGRID 12.1 delivers up to 12TB/s throughput and massive scale for AI workloads SAN JOSE, Calif. — NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced the release of StorageGRID 12.1, designed to help customers scale AI and other modern workloads with a federated global namespace. The new capabilities improve how data is accessed, [...]
